title: Purdue hosts 12th Midwest Workshop on Control and Game Theory, advancing research and collaboration
summary_en: Purdue University welcomed researchers, students and industry professionals from across the region for the 12th Midwest Workshop on Control and Game Theory (MWCGT), held April 25–26 in West Lafayette.
title_cn: [待翻译] Purdue hosts 12th Midwest Workshop on Control and Game Theory, advancing research and collaboration

title: College of Engineering welcomes 38 incoming graduate fellows
summary_en: The Purdue University College of Engineering has named 38 incoming graduate students as Lambertus Doctoral and Graduate Excellence Fellows, recognizing exceptional academic achievement and strong potential to advance engineering research and innovation.
title_cn: [待翻译] College of Engineering welcomes 38 incoming graduate fellows

title: Purdue Engineering rallies Boilermaker community to raise nearly $12 million on Day of Giving
summary_en: Purdue University celebrated its 13th annual Day of Giving on April 29 with a powerful show of support for its College of Engineering, with 340 gifts totaling nearly $12 million in just 24 hours given to advance education, research and student success.
title_cn: [待翻译] Purdue Engineering rallies Boilermaker community to raise nearly $12 million on Day of Giving

title: Purdue Engineering to host Latin American academic leaders for inaugural LIDER program
summary_en: This May, Purdue Engineering will welcome a select group of engineering academic leaders from across Latin America for the Leadership Institute for Developing Excellence in Research, Education and Administration (LIDER).
title_cn: [待翻译] Purdue Engineering to host Latin American academic leaders for inaugural LIDER program
